subject: Refactor CDS code

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/ccsdk-apps-master-verify-java/682

Patch Set 1:

Please refactor only core and resource-dict modules from components, We can keep catalog project in components itself, and the owner/user for those projects will be different person.

Patch Set 1:

> Please refactor only core and resource-dict modules from components, We can keep catalog project in components itself, and the owner/user for those projects will be different person.

The point is to have everything relating to CDS within ccsdk/apps/ms/cds directory. Hence I don't think we should keep the ccsdk/apps/components directory.

Sure, In that case, please place the model-catalog project as it is under ms.
